coreResponsibility.description: A player plugin that integrates Kaltura Advanced Video Analytics (KAVA) with the Kaltura Player, tracking and reporting video playback events, quality metrics, and user interactions to the Kaltura analytics service for QoS/QoE monitoring and business intelligence.

featureOwnership: Video Analytics Event Tracking (VIEW, IMPRESSION, PLAY, PAUSE, RESUME, BUFFER, SEEK)
Quality of Service (QoS) Metrics Collection (bitrate, buffer time, dropped frames, segment download times)
Quality of Experience (QoE) Metrics Tracking (join time, buffering events, error tracking)
User Interaction Analytics (audio/caption selection, flavor switching, speed changes)
Application Event Analytics (UI interactions, button clicks, page loads, feature usage)
Session Management (session creation, timeout handling, reset after inactivity)
Periodic VIEW Event Reporting (configurable interval reporting during active playback)
Live Stream Analytics with Failed Event Logging
Plugin Integration Analytics (Share, Downloads, Moderation, Related plugins)
Network Performance Metrics (connection type, bandwidth, overhead, manifest/segment timing)
Error Event Reporting with Position Context
dataHandling: Player State Tracking (playing, paused, buffering, seeking, ended states)
Bitrate and ABR Statistics (actual bitrate, average bitrate, flavor switches)
Buffer Health Metrics (buffer time, buffer time sum, forward buffer health, target buffer)
Timing Data (join time, play time sum, session duration, event timestamps)
Video Track Information (audio language, caption language, video quality)
Performance Metrics (dropped frames ratio, segment download times, manifest download times)
Network Connection Data (connection type, bandwidth, network overhead)
User Context (partner ID, entry ID, session ID, user ID, KS token)
Playback Context (playback mode, delivery type, DVR threshold for live)
Application Context (application name, version, hosting application, player skin)
Custom Variables (customVar1, customVar2, customVar3 for extensibility)
Error Data (error code, error details, error position in playback)
Event Sequence Tracking (event index for ordered event reconstruction)

services: Kaltura Analytics API (analytics.kaltura.com/api_v3/index.php) - Primary analytics ingestion endpoint
repositories: @playkit-js/kaltura-player-js - Core player framework providing player instance and events
@playkit-js/playkit-js - Base PlayKit library providing player core functionality
@playkit-js/playkit-js-providers - Provides OVPAnalyticsService for HTTP analytics transmission
dataProviders: Player Event System - Consumes player lifecycle events (PLAY, PAUSE, PLAYING, SEEKING, SEEKED, ENDED, ERROR, etc.)
Player State Machine - Reads current playback state, position, buffered ranges
Video Track API - Accesses selected audio/video/text tracks
Player Configuration - Receives partner ID, entry ID, session ID, KS token
Player Performance API - Reads dropped frames, quality metrics via HTMLVideoElement
Performance Observer API - Monitors network resource timing for segments and manifests

consumers: Kaltura Analytics Backend - Receives all analytics events for storage, processing, and reporting
Kaltura BI/Reporting Systems - Consumes aggregated analytics data for dashboards and reports
Player Applications - Can access plugin via player.plugins.kava for custom analytics or event models
Third-party Analytics Integration - Applications can use tamperAnalyticsHandler to intercept/modify events
apis: Public Plugin API (player.plugins.kava.sendAnalytics) - Allows custom analytics event submission
Event Model API (player.plugins.kava.getEventModel) - Retrieves structured event data
Event Type API (player.plugins.kava.EventType) - Exposes KAVA event type constants

kaltura: Kaltura Analytics API v3 (analytics.kaltura.com/api_v3/index.php) - POST/GET requests for event tracking
OVPAnalyticsService.trackEvent - Provided by @playkit-js/playkit-js-providers for analytics transmission
thirdParty: Performance Observer API - Browser API for monitoring network resource timing
HTMLVideoElement Quality API - Browser API for dropped/decoded frames metrics
Network Information API - Browser API for connection type detection
Page Visibility API - Browser API for tab focus/visibility tracking
localStorage API - Browser storage for failed live event logging
playerIntegrations: Share Plugin Events - Tracks share button clicks and social network interactions
Downloads Plugin Events - Tracks download button interactions
Moderation Plugin Events - Tracks moderation feature usage
Related Plugin Events - Tracks related content interactions
PlayKit UI Events - Tracks UI interactions, layout changes, dual-screen features

entryPoints.main: src/index.ts - Plugin registration entry point that registers 'kava' plugin with Kaltura Player
coreLogic: src/kava.ts - Main plugin class (Kava extends BasePlugin), lifecycle management, event binding, analytics transmission
src/kava-model.ts - Data model class storing all analytics metrics and state
src/kava-event-model.ts - Defines player event types and their data models (VIEW, IMPRESSION, PLAY, PAUSE, etc.)
src/application-events-model.ts - Defines application/UI event types and models (button clicks, page loads)
src/kava-timer.ts - Timer management using Web Workers for periodic VIEW event reporting
src/kava-rate-handler.ts - Bitrate calculation and ABR tracking logic
utilities: src/log-failed-live-events.ts - localStorage logging for failed live stream analytics
src/enums/ - Event types, application features, button types, HTTP methods

commonBugPatterns.description: Common issues that strongly indicate this repository
patterns: Analytics events not being sent to Kaltura
VIEW events stopping or not firing at expected intervals
Incorrect buffer time or play time sum calculations
Join time not calculated correctly on first play
Bitrate not being reported or incorrect ABR metrics
Session resetting unexpectedly or not resetting after timeout
Dropped frames ratio not reporting accurately
Segment/manifest download times missing or incorrect
Error events not capturing correct error context
Live stream analytics failures not being logged
Application events (button clicks, UI interactions) not tracked
Network performance metrics (bandwidth, connection type) not reported
Milestone events (25%, 50%, 75%, 90%, 100%) not firing
Analytics data incorrect after seek or replay
Custom analytics handler (tamperAnalyticsHandler) not being invoked

antiPatterns.description: Issues that should NOT be triaged to this repository
patterns: Video playback not starting (core player issue)
Video buffering or stalling (core player issue)
ABR switching logic or quality selection (player core issue)
Player UI rendering or controls (kaltura-player-js or UI components)
Media loading or source selection (playkit-js or providers)
DRM/licensing issues (playkit-js-drm or providers)
Ad playback or insertion (ad plugins)
Live stream delivery or DVR functionality (player core)
Backend analytics processing or BI reporting (Kaltura server-side)
Player configuration loading (kaltura-player-js)
